properties.remark: NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZED HAIL COVERED THE GROUND.
HAIL COVERED THE GROUND WITH THE LARGEST UP TO 1 INCH IN DIAMETER.
PENNY TO GOLFBALL SIZE HAIL WAS COVERING THE ROAD.

LARGE SECTION OF ROOF PEELED OFF FORMER CAR DEALERSHIP BUILDING AND LANDED ONTO ADJACENT STREET CAUSING ADDITIONAL DAMAGE TO SOME VEHICLES PARKED NEAR THE BUILDING. THIS REPORT WAS RELAYED BY BROADCAST MEDIA.
